name: Mental Health Discharge Planning Intake
description: Mental health discharge planning intake for clinicians and case managers planning a discharge from psychiatric inpatient, residential, or intensive outpatient mental health treatment. Evaluates the clinical stability, the safety plan, the step-down care, the support system, the medication plan, and the crisis resources to produce a mental health discharge planning profile with safe discharge criteria and aftercare coordination requirements. Not clinical advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
